About

Strategy meets execution in Web3.

BizOps and BizDev professional who has been building in the crypto space since early 2021. From regulated trading platforms to mobile wallets and community growth tools, I've worked across the full spectrum of the Web3 ecosystem.

My work sits at the intersection of partnerships, product, and process — delivering tangible results through sharp GTM strategy and operational excellence.

Partnerships GTM Strategy Process Optimization Business Development Product Strategy
